_meta.purpose: Original house slogans for ANARCHISM.AFRICA / FairPlay merch, themed on 'The Modern Colosseum' research. Feed the POD quote-tee generator (js/merch-lab.js) and seed.json merch[]. Distinct from data/afro-anarchist-quotes.json, which holds attributed historical quotes.

edge_levels.safe: Provoking but trademark- and policy-clean. No brand names, no real logos.
edge_levels.sharp: Names the system (money, spectacle, colony) in the abstract. Higher edge, still defensible.
edge_levels.spicy: Direct, confrontational framing. Highest impact and highest brand/legal risk — review before printing.

slogans.note: Flagship line. Works as front print.

slogans.text: THEY SELL THE GAME. WE ARE THE PRODUCT.
90 MINUTES. A BILLION EYES. WHO COUNTS THE MONEY?
EVERY SECOND ON SCREEN HAS A PRICE
MY HEROES WEAR A BETTING COMPANY'S NAME
THE STADIUM ROARS. THE HOUSE ALWAYS WINS.
5,262 GAMBLING ADS IN ONE MATCH. THE KIDS WERE WATCHING.
slogans.note: Cites dossier figure — keep the number, it's the punch.

slogans.text: A GOAL FOR THE NATION. A WAGE FOR A CONTINENT.
WIN AND I'M FRENCH. LOSE AND I'M AFRICAN.
slogans.note: Echoes Evra. Powerful but pointed — review.

slogans.text: THEY TOOK THE LAND. NOW THEY SCOUT THE CHILDREN.
THE PITCH IS FLOODING. THE SPONSORS ARE FINE.
87% OF THE DAMAGE IS HOW YOU GOT HERE
ONE TROPHY. A STADIUM OF DEBT.
WHAT'S THE TEMPERATURE OF YOUR GAME?
FAIR PLAY IS NOT A SLOGAN. IT'S A BALANCE SHEET.
THE BALL IS FREE. EVERYTHING ELSE IS FOR SALE.
